response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video, identified two distinct vocal performances by Ouro Kronii. 2. Identified Song 1 as 'Zankyou' (Time Left) (credited to ACAね/Zutomayo). 3. Identified Song 2 as 'Identity' (credited to Kanaria). 4. Used search tool to confirm artist/title and retrieve lyrics. 5. Mapped scenes chronologically based on visual/audio transitions. 6. Generated JSON with metadata and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a virtual idol, Ouro Kronii, performing two songs, 'Zankyou' (Time Left) by Zutomayo and 'Identity' by Kanaria.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii stands on a circular platform and introduces the upcoming performances. No music is playing.
Ouro Kronii performs the song 'Zankyou' (Time Left) on the stage. The text '残機' and 'Lyrics, Music: ACAね' are displayed on screen.

I can only see the waveforms
Rotten demo bass

I can't escape from this routine anymore
I want to quit, I can't quit
(I'm) in so much pain
Are you kidding me, worrying about whether I'm in a good mood?
The things I make are just things that already exist

I want to put it to rest
Don't have expectations for special characters

Don't let yourself be defeated by the attack of the faint lingering scent
I want meaning
I'm spilling out things that aren't like me at all
It would be nice if you could laugh at me like this again

It flew away, my complaints scattered
I'm the one who dirtied your white sleeves
Why did you apologize?
I've been unable to stand on the stage since that time

I can't escape from this routine anymore
I want to quit, I can't quit
(I'm) in so much pain
Are you kidding me, worrying about whether I'm in a good mood?
The things I sing are just things that already exist

Deep night when I feel like I can do something
I want to put it to rest
Don't have expectations for special characters...

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii continues performing. The song transitions to 'Identity' by Kanaria. The text 'アイデンティティ' and 'Lyrics, Music: Kanaria' are displayed on screen.
